scheme_name: HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth
exit_load: Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 3 days
about_fund:
About HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Arun Agarwal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹708.12.
The HDFC BSE Sensex Index Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 0.25% if redeemed within 3 days
